title: rvoptkb-extract Input
description: Input JSON format for the rvoptkb-extract skill. Generated by fetch-github.py or fetch-github.sh from a GitHub commit URL.

patch_subject.description: First line of the commit message (subject line / title)
examples: cpu: rv64: gemm: improve gemm kernel performance by tuning LMUL

cpu: rv64: gemm: improve gemm kernel performance by tuning LMUL

Adjust LMUL parameters...

code_diff.description: Complete unified diff/patch content from the commit (all files concatenated)

output_path.description: Absolute or relative path where output JSON should be written. Generated by fetch script as {repo}_{fullSHA}_output.json.
